title: We shouldn't confuse politics and football - Scaloni
summary: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni emphasizes he will not mix football and politics ahead of Argentina's World Cup semi-final against England. This statement comes as the two nations prepare for their knockout stage clash.
content: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni says he is "not going to mix" football and politics before his side's World Cup semi-final against England.

zh.title: 我们不应该混淆政治和足球 - 斯卡洛尼
zh.summary: 阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼强调，在阿根廷与英格兰的世界杯半决赛前，他不会将足球和政治混为一谈。这一声明是在两个国家为淘汰赛阶段的冲突做准备之际发出的。

title: Keane was Kane's England team-mate - this week they are on different paths
summary: Former England Under-19s team-mates Will Keane and Harry Kane are on divergent career paths as they prepare for the World Cup. The two former strike partners will face different circumstances this week.
content: Will Keane and Harry Kane used to be team-mates for England Under-19s - but this week the former strike partners are on very different paths.

zh.title: 基恩曾是凯恩的英格兰队友——本周他们走上了不同的道路
zh.summary: 曾经的英格兰U19队友威尔·基恩和哈里·凯恩在为世界杯做准备时职业生涯走上了不同的道路。这两位前锋搭档本周将面临不同的情况。

title: The 91-year-old Argentine journalist covering his 18th World Cup
summary: At 91 years old, Enrique Macaya Marquez is covering his 18th World Cup, having reported on every tournament since 1958 when a young Pele participated. His decades-long career spans the entire modern history of the tournament.
content: Enrique Macaya Marquez has covered every World Cup since 1958, where a 17-year-old Pele featured.

zh.title: 91岁的阿根廷记者报道他的第18届世界杯
zh.summary: 91岁的恩里克·马卡亚·马尔克斯正在报道他的第18届世界杯，自1958年年轻的贝利参加比赛以来，他报道了每届赛事。他长达数十年的职业生涯跨越了该赛事整个现代历史。

title: Rangers in talks with Leicester over Mavididi - gossip
summary: Rangers are negotiating with Leicester over winger Mavididi, while a Scotland defender could move south and Celtic are among clubs interested in a Utrecht forward. Transfer activity is ongoing among these Scottish and English clubs.
content: Rangers in talks with Leicester winger, Scotland defender could head south and Celtic among clubs interested in Utrecht forward.

zh.title: 流言：流浪者与莱斯特城就马维迪迪进行谈判
zh.summary: 流浪者正在与莱斯特城就边锋马维迪迪进行谈判，同时苏格兰后卫可能南下，凯尔特人等俱乐部对乌得勒支一名前锋感兴趣。苏格兰和英格兰俱乐部之间的转会活动正在进行中。

title: What happened to David Batty, who shook off penalty miss against Argentina?
summary: England midfielder David Batty famously recovered from missing a penalty against Argentina in 1998, and as the two nations prepare to meet again in World Cup knockouts, BBC Sport explores his career trajectory. The article traces what Batty did after the infamous penalty miss.
content: England midfielder David Batty quickly shook off his penalty miss against Argentina in 1998. As the two teams prepare to meet in the World Cup knockout stage again, BBC Sport asks: what happened to him?

zh.title: 大卫·巴蒂发生了什么事？他如何从对阿根廷的点球失手中走出来？
zh.summary: 英格兰中场大卫·巴蒂因在1998年对阿根廷的比赛中失点球而闻名，他随后成功恢复职业生涯。随着两国即将在世界杯淘汰赛中再次交锋，BBC体育频道探讨了他的职业轨迹。文章追溯了巴蒂在那次臭名昭著的点球失手后的经历。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 38
summary: This is a guessing game challenge asking readers to identify a World Cup player through limited clues. The goal is to identify the mystery player in as few attempts as possible.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.summary: 这是一个猜谜游戏挑战，要求读者根据有限的线索识别世界杯球员。目标是尽可能少的尝试次数内识别这位神秘球员。

title: Bellingham best player at World Cup - Rooney
summary: Former England striker Wayne Rooney names Jude Bellingham as the best player at the 2026 World Cup so far. Bellingham's performances have impressed one of England's greatest players.
content: Jude Bellingham has been the best player at the World Cup so far, says former England striker Wayne Rooney.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆是世界杯最佳球员 - 鲁尼

title: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
summary: As England prepares to face Norway in the World Cup quarter-finals at Miami Stadium, the article compiles all goals scored by Thomas Tuchel's squad in their tournament run. The compilation showcases England's offensive output leading up to the quarter-final clash.
content: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.

zh.title: 英格兰2026年世界杯征程中的全部进球
zh.summary: 当英格兰准备在迈阿密球场与挪威争夺世界杯八强席位时，本文汇总了图赫尔麾下球队在本届赛事中的全部进球。这个合集展示了英格兰队在八强之战前的进攻威力。

title: All of Argentina's goals from the World Cup so far
summary: The video compilation shows all 17 goals scored by Argentina in their path to the World Cup semi-final, where they will face England. Argentina's prolific attack led them to this stage of the tournament.
content: Watch all 17 of Argentina's goals from World Cup 2026 on their way to the semi-final, where they face England.

zh.title: 阿根廷在世界杯上的全部进球
zh.summary: 视频合集展示了阿根廷在晋级世界杯半决赛过程中的全部17球，他们将在半决赛中对阵英格兰。阿根廷的强势进攻将他们带到了本届赛事的这一阶段。

title: Mates, mate and freedom - how Argentina got the best out of Messi
summary: Argentina's squad is strategically built around maximizing Lionel Messi's impact as they face England in the World Cup semi-finals. Analyst Guillem Balague explores how the team structure brings out the best in their legendary captain.
content: Guillem Balague examines how the Argentina squad is built around Lionel Messi as they prepare to play against England in the World Cup semi-finals.

zh.title: 伙伴、玛黛茶与自由——阿根廷如何最大化梅西
zh.summary: 阿根廷队战略性地围绕最大化莱昂内尔·梅西的影响力组建,在世界杯半决赛中面对英格兰。分析师吉列姆·巴拉格探讨球队结构如何最大程度地发挥这位传奇队长的能力。

title: England's biggest match since 1966 as Three Lions close in on immortality
summary: England faces Argentina in a World Cup semi-final carrying historic weight, with success potentially matching the nation's legendary 1966 triumph. Phil McNulty examines why this match represents a watershed moment for the Three Lions.
content: England face Argentina in the World Cup semi-finals on Wednesday - and BBC Sport's Phil McNulty explains why it is the Three Lions' biggest match since 1966.

zh.title: 英格兰自1966年以来最重要的比赛,三狮逼近不朽
zh.summary: 英格兰在世界杯半决赛中面对阿根廷,这场比赛承载着历史的重量,成功可能与该国传奇的1966年胜利相媲美。菲尔·麦克纳蒂探讨了为什么这场比赛代表了三狮的分水岭时刻。

title: I still feel pain of '98 but this can be different for England - Shearer
summary: Alan Shearer remains haunted by England's 1998 World Cup loss to Argentina but believes the current squad has the opportunity to reverse that history. The legendary striker explains how this semi-final represents a chance for redemption.
content: England's defeat to Argentina at the 1998 World Cup still burns deep for Alan Shearer, but he explains why this team can take their chance to change their lives forever.

zh.title: 我仍感受到98年的伤痛,但英格兰这次可以不同——谢勒
zh.summary: 艾伦·谢勒仍然为英格兰1998年世界杯对阿根廷的失利感到困扰,但他相信目前的球队有机会改写这段历史。这位传奇前锋解释了这场半决赛如何代表了救赎的机会。

title: A special team beats brilliant individuals - how silky Spain flattened France
summary: Spain's cohesive, team-oriented approach overcame France's individual brilliance in their World Cup semi-final, with the Spanish advancing despite flying under the radar throughout the tournament. Their progression raises questions about whether collective excellence can carry them to the championship.
content: Spain have rather flown under the radar at the 2026 World Cup - but will they go all the way and win it?

zh.title: 特殊球队战胜天才个体 - 优雅的西班牙如何击败法国
zh.summary: 西班牙凝聚力强、注重团队的方式在世界杯半决赛中克服了法国的个人天才光芒，尽管西班牙在整个赛事中表现低调，他们仍然成功晋级。他们的晋级引发了一个问题：集体卓越能否将他们带往冠军之座。

title: Pressure is on world champions Argentina in semi-final - Guehi
summary: England defender Marc Guehi asserts that defending champions Argentina face the greater pressure heading into their World Cup semi-final clash. His confidence reflects England's mindset as they prepare to challenge the reigning title holders.
content: England defender Marc Guehi insists the pressure is on Argentina as the Three Lions prepare to face the reigning champions in the World Cup semi-finals.

zh.title: 压力在世界冠军阿根廷身上 - 盖赫
zh.summary: 英格兰后卫马克·盖赫声称，卫冕冠军阿根廷在即将到来的世界杯半决赛中面临更大的压力。他的自信反映了英格兰队准备挑战卫冕冠军的心态。
